title: juncus subuliflorus f. leersii
intro: Juncus subuliflorus f. leersii, also known as Leers' rush, is a type of flowering plant in the Juncaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Leers' rush is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
